abstract: Fetches records by using a query.
overview:
## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.QueryResponse] object if the operation succeeds; otherwise, a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

To fetch records that match some criteria, create a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Query] dictionary.

Execute the query using the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/performQuery] method. To get the records that were fetched, use the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordsResponse/records] property in the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.QueryResponse] class. Otherwise, handle any errors appropriately.

Creating Queries That Search by Location

You can fetch records whose `Location` field lies within a circular region by specifying the center and radius of a circle in a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Query] dictionary. The `Location` field specified in the query must be indexed for the fetch to succeed.

Execute this query using the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/performQuery] method.

Handling Large Numbers of Results

If the results of a fetch exceeds the maximum number of records allowed in a response, perform the fetch again until all the records are fetched. You can also specify the results limit when performing a query.

To set a results limit, pass a dictionary as the `options` parameter to the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/performQuery] method. In the dictionary, set the `resultsLimit` key to the number of records you want to fetch for each operation. If the `moreComing` property of the response object is `true`, the results exceeded the limit and you should perform the fetch operation again until `moreComing` is false. The next time you perform the operation, pass the response object to the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/performQuery] method. The response object contains the fetch options you passed the first time you called the method.

For example, perform a query limiting the results to 10 records until all records matching the query are fetched.

For the maximum number of records in a response and other data limits, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/PropertyMetrics.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240-CH23] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240].

items.description: Creates records batch builder object for modifying multiple records.
